ddls:
CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the skill */,
  "charges" INTEGER /* Number of charges required to use the skill */,
  "min_rlvl" INTEGER /* Minimum required level to use the skill */,
  "ladder_eligible" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the skill is ladder-eligible */,
  "skill_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the skill */,
  "skill_category" TEXT /* The category of the skill (e.g., Attack, Defense, Utility) */,
  "skill_icon" TEXT /* The icon or image associated with the skill */,
  "skill_effect" TEXT /* The effect of the skill when used */,
  "skill_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the skill effect */,
  "skill_cooldown" INTEGER /* The cooldown period before the skill can be used again */,
  "skill_requirements" TEXT /* Additional requirements to use the skill (e.g., mana, stamina) */,
  "skill_unlock_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions to unlock the skill (e.g., completing a quest, reaching a certain level) */,
  "skill_rarity" TEXT /* The rarity of the skill (e.g., Common, Rare, Epic, Legendary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of the equipment (e.g., mace, staff, ring) */,
  "equipment_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the equipment */,
  "equipment_icon" TEXT /* The icon or image associated with the equipment */,
  "equipment_rarity" TEXT /* The rarity of the equipment (e.g., Common, Rare, Epic, Legendary) */,
  "equipment_stat1" TEXT /* The first stat provided by the equipment (e.g., +50 Strength) */,
  "equipment_stat2" TEXT /* The second stat provided by the equipment (e.g., +10 Dexterity) */,
  "equipment_stat3" TEXT /* The third stat provided by the equipment (e.g., +5% Crit Chance) */,
  "equipment_requirements" TEXT /* Requirements to use the equipment (e.g., minimum level, specific class) */,
  "equipment_unlock_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions to unlock the equipment (e.g., completing a quest, reaching a certain level) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skill_equipment" (
  "skill_equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill-equipment relationship */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment */,
  "amount_required" INTEGER /* The amount of the equipment required to unlock the skill */,
  "is_optional" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the equipment is optional for unlocking the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_equipment_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_equipment_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)
